variables.body_type: athletic swimmer-wrestler build, broad shoulders, strong legs, visible abs, developing biceps
variables.hair_color: light ash blonde, short, slightly messy
variables.clothing_signature: casual sporty — t-shirts, hoodies, sweatpants, sometimes swimming trunks visible under clothes
variables.scent: fresh chlorine mixed with young male sweat, clean soap, slight sweetness of youth
variables.stubble: none, smooth face, occasional peach fuzz
variables.features: slavic facial features, high cheekbones, soft jaw, full lips, innocent expression

anatomic_anchor.face_shape: oval with soft jaw, high cheekbones, youthful fullness, slavic proportions

eyes.color: bright blue, clear, with light flecks, wide and trusting
eyes.distance: slightly wider than average, giving innocent appearance
eyes.eyelids: double eyelids with visible natural crease, slight hood when shy — eyes half-lowered
eyes.eyebrows: light blonde, medium thickness, straight, soft arch

anatomic_anchor.nose: slightly upturned, snub-nosed, cute button nose, refined tip
anatomic_anchor.lips: full, soft, natural pink, slightly parted when nervous or aroused, Cupid's bow
anatomic_anchor.jaw: soft, rounded, no sharp angles, youthful, almost feminine in softness but male
anatomic_anchor.skin_texture: smooth, minimal pores, occasional teenage blemish but generally clear, fair with slight flush when embarrassed
distinguishing_features: slightly upturned snub nose — signature cute feature
light blonde eyebrows almost invisible against fair skin
small scar on left eyebrow — from wrestling childhood
neck muscles defined from swimming — visible veins when exerted
broad shoulders but narrow hips — swimmer's V-taper developing
age_indicators: peach fuzz on jawline — not real beard
hands slightly large for body — still growing into them
anatomic_anchor.visual_signature: young athletic man 18, light ash blonde short messy hair, bright blue wide innocent eyes, slightly upturned snub nose, slavic facial features, athletic swimmer-wrestler build, broad shoulders, visible abs, strong legs, smooth face no stubble, 165cm compact build, innocent expression, shy but strong
